28:81:15.m: he was (part of negative phrase with مَا)

28:81:17.m: the ones who help/defend themselves (object of كَانَ)

28:82:1.m: and he became (subject of يَقُولُونَ - they say)

28:82:3.m: they wished something for themselves intensely

28:82:4.m: his place (object of تَمَنَّوْا - they wished for)

28:82:8.m: Allah (as the object of مَنَّ - bestowed favor)

َ: (as the object of مَنَّ - bestowed favor)

28:82:16.m: if not, had it not been

لَوْلَآ: if not, had it not been

28:82:18.m: he bestowed great favor (subject of لَخَسَفَ)

28:82:21.m: he would surely have made (something) sink

28:82:23.m: woe! it is as if he/it

28:82:26.m: the ones who reject (truth) (subject of لَا يُفْلِحُ - will not succeed)

ُونَ: (subject of لَا يُفْلِحُ - will not succeed)

28:83:1.m: that (feminine, pointing to something far away) (points to ٱلدَّارُ)

28:83:4.m: we make/set it (referring to الدَّارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةُ - the final home)

28:83:7.m: they want/desire (referring to those who don't seek elevation or corruption)

28:83:14.m: for the ones who guard against evil

28:84:3.m: with the good deed (object of جَآءَ - came with)

28:84:9.m: with/by the evil deed/sin (object of جَآءَ)

28:84:10.m: so not/then not (connects to يُجْزَى - they will be recompensed)

28:84:11.m: he is given what is due (passive of جَآءَ)

28:84:18.m: they used to work/act/do (object of كَانُوا)

28:85:3.m: he made required (the Quran upon you)

28:85:8.m: place of return (being described in this ayah)

28:85:11.m: more knowing (than those who are misguided)

28:86:6.m: to you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in this ayah)

28:86:7.m: the book (subject of يُلْقَىٰٓ - is sent down)

ُ: subject of يُلْقَىٰٓ - is sent down

28:86:13.m: you will definitely be (a helper for the disbelievers)

28:87:7.m: when (referring to أُنزِلَتْ - they were sent down)

28:87:16.m: the polytheists (those who join partners with Allah)

28:88:5.m: a god/deity (object of تَدْعُ - do not call upon)

28:88:7.m: there is not (strong negation of إِلٰهَ)

28:88:14.m: except (excluding هُوَ from the statement لَآ إِلٰهَ)

28:88:15.m: His Face (referring to Allah's Face, being excluded from destruction)

28:88:16.m: for him/to him (connected to الْحُكْمُ - the judgment)

28:88:17.m: the judgment/authority (belongs to لَهُ - to Him)
